title: GenericOrthotropicMaterial
description: GenericOrthotropicMaterial: Generic orthotropic material to be used for orthotropic materials not yet explicitly supported.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

Density.description: Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

DampingRatio.description: Dynamic damping ratio, expressed as a ratio between actual damping and critical damping. For structures, typically taken as 0.02 (i.e. 2%). Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
